prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as a loose source for the vertical composition and bright high backlight, transform the scene into a warm anime-style behind-the-scenes fashion studio photoshoot. Remove the stairwell, window, handrail, floor numbering, tactile paving, and wall fixtures. Add exactly 1 full-body anime girl centered in frame, standing shyly with knees slightly inward and hands clasped in front, wearing a black gothic-lolita blouse with a large bow, ruffled collar, ornate short skirt, and knee-high socks. Give her soft twin ponytails and round glasses. Add exactly 4 visible studio-production elements around the edges: 1 dark blurred lighting/camera rig on the left foreground, 1 black softbox at the upper right, 1 light stand on the right, and 1 rectangular equipment block at the lower right. Keep the background simple beige, with strong warm overhead spotlight glow, rim light, soft shadows on the floor, shallow depth of field, and cinematic anime illustration rendering.
